title: [v4.5] Revert "Resolve symlink path for qemu directory if possible"
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #18322

/assign Luap99

```release-note
Do not fully resolve symlinks in the path to `edk2-aarch64-code.fd` to prevent
breakage with qemu updates.
```
